forbidden.title: This account does not have admin access.
forbidden.description: You are signed in through the SSO portal, but this account role is not allowed to open the admin frontend.

mfa_required.enrollment_title: Enroll multi-factor authentication before opening admin.
mfa_required.enrollment_description: Admin accounts must have a verified second factor. Open the security portal, enroll MFA, then return to the admin frontend.
mfa_required.step_up_title: Your admin session needs to be refreshed.
mfa_required.step_up_description: The admin session is active, but the authentication age is not fresh enough to open the panel. Sign in again through the SSO portal.

common.session_expired_desc: Login again from the portal to continue.
common.forbidden_desc: You do not have permission to view this page.
common.error_loading_desc: Try reloading or use the request ID for investigation.

dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
dashboard.summary: Read-only summary for users, sessions, clients, audit, incidents, and DSR. The backend remains the security boundary.
dashboard.empty_description: No dashboard summary to display. Refresh data or check backend permissions if this condition is unexpected.
dashboard.error_title: Admin dashboard could not be loaded

policy.title: Policy & RBAC
policy.summary: Security policy versions, activation evidence, and role permissions.
policy.error_title: Policy/RBAC admin could not be loaded
policy.empty_desc: No policy or RBAC evidence to display.

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.summary: List of roles, permission matrix, and assignees for each admin role. Role changes require the admin.roles.write permission.
roles.matrix_desc: All permissions registered in the backend, grouped by domain.
roles.no_permissions: This role has no permissions yet.

users.title: Users
users.summary: Manage user status, MFA support, reset lifecycle, and session evidence.
users.error_title: Admin users could not be loaded
users.empty_desc: Create a new user or check filters and admin permissions.
users.confirm_lock_desc: This will lock {target} and may block sign-in.
users.confirm_reset_mfa_desc: This will remove MFA assurance for {target}.
users.confirm_password_reset_desc: This will issue a backend password reset workflow for {target}.
users.confirm_revoke_sessions_desc: This will terminate active session evidence item(s) for {target}.
users.password_reset_evidence: Password reset dikirim melalui channel aman backend. Gunakan audit evidence untuk pelacakan.
users.select_user_desc: Select a user from the sidebar list to inspect identity context, active sessions, and account lifecycle controls.

clients.title: OAuth Clients
clients.summary: Manage OIDC client metadata, redirect URI evidence, and secure secret rotation.
clients.error_title: OAuth clients could not be loaded
clients.no_client_selected_desc: Select or create an OAuth client to view governance evidence.
clients.empty_desc: Create a new client to start managing redirect URIs and scope evidence.
clients.secret_hint: Rotating the secret reveals the plaintext only once. Copy it, then clear it from the screen.
clients.secret_reveal_warning: Store this secret securely in your key vault. It will not be shown again after you close the screen or press the button below.
clients.lifecycle_impact: Impact summary: disable blocks new authorization and may revoke active tokens. Decommission retires client configuration and clears redirect evidence.
clients.disable_hint: Disabling the client blocks new authorization requests and may revoke active tokens.
clients.disable_placeholder: Enter the reason for disabling this client...
clients.decommission_hint: Destructive action: permanently removes the client configuration. This cannot be undone.
clients.decommission_placeholder: Type the client ID to confirm...

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.summary: Inspect and terminate active session evidence across client contexts.
sessions.error_title: Admin sessions could not be loaded
sessions.empty_desc: No active sessions at this time.
sessions.terminate_hint: Terminating this session will immediately disconnect the user and force re-authentication.
sessions.revoke_hint: This action will invalidate the session credentials on the identity platform.
sessions.no_session_desc: Select a session from the list to view activity details and termination controls.

audit.title: Audit Compliance
audit.summary: Audit trail, integrity hash-chain, and DSR evidence queue.
audit.error_title: Audit compliance could not be loaded
audit.empty_desc: No audit evidence to display. Run a search or wait for backend events to be recorded.
audit.export_desc: Export filtered audit events to CSV or JSONL. Privileged action: backend requires step-up reauthentication and AUDIT_EXPORT permission.
audit.evidence_pack_desc: Compile a curated evidence pack (audit subset + integrity hash-chain + related DSR + retention) for a date range or correlation ID. Privileged action: requires step-up reauthentication and AUDIT_EXPORT, logging 'evidence_pack_generated'.
audit.evidence_pack_hint: Fill date range (From + To) or correlation ID to enable generation.
audit.retention_desc: Summary of retention windows, prune schedules, prune candidates, and last run for compliance evidence pack.
audit.search_desc: Search evidence by correlation/request ID, SID, action, outcome, taxonomy, subject, or date range.
audit.consent_desc: Quickly filter consent allow, deny, and revoke by subject or client to investigate consent trail.
audit.risk_challenge_desc: Backend auth audit events show login challenge outcomes, MFA-required states, and notification dispatch evidence when recorded.
audit.acr_policy_desc: Unknown ACR values are treated as no requirement (permissive) per accepted policy NG-03/FR-021. RPs requesting unrecognised assurance levels receive password-level flow rather than an error.
audit.consent_revocation_desc: Consent allow, deny, and revoke events are reviewed through the audit event feed.
audit.legacy_fallback_desc: Fallback usage stays an ops-tracked evidence item until backend emits a dedicated signal.
audit.token_lifetime_desc: Production token/session lifetime guard evidence remains backend-owned and deploy-gated.
audit.session_logout_desc: SID propagation, RP sessions, and front/back-channel logout outcomes use audit evidence.
audit.safe_error_desc: Admin evidence pages show request IDs and safe copy instead of raw backend/OIDC errors.

auth_audit.title: Authentication Audit
auth_audit.summary: Authentication event history: login, logout, consent, MFA challenge, and authentication errors. Unlike the Audit Trail (which records admin actions), this page records user authentication activity. Permission: admin.authentication-audit.read.
auth_audit.empty_description: Use the filters above or wait for authentication events to be recorded in the backend.
auth_audit.session_expired_desc: Login again from the portal to continue.
auth_audit.error_loading_title: Authentication audit could not be loaded
auth_audit.error_loading_desc: Try reloading or use the request ID for investigation.

external_idps.title: External IdPs
external_idps.summary: Configure external identity providers, health, mapping, and failover controls.
external_idps.error_title: External IdP admin could not be loaded
external_idps.empty_desc: Add an external provider to manage health, mapping, and failover.

ip_access.title: IP Access Rules
ip_access.summary: Manage IP allow/blocklist rules for SSO admin access.
ip_access.error_title: IP access rules could not be loaded
ip_access.empty_title: IP access rules not yet available
ip_access.empty_desc: No IP access rules yet. Add a CIDR allow/block when permission is available.
ip_access.create_desc: Add an allow/block rule for a specific CIDR. Changes are audited.

oidc.title: Protocol Health and Evidence FR-001–FR-005.
oidc.summary: Read-only admin surface for Discovery, JWKS, availability, catalog, issuer, and endpoint consistency. Backend remains the source of truth.
oidc.error_title: OIDC Foundation could not be loaded

ops.title: Ops Evidence
ops.summary: Readiness, operational drill evidence, and compliance evidence references without credential telemetry in the browser.
ops.error_title: Ops evidence could not be loaded

profile.title: Admin Profile
profile.summary: Information about the currently logged-in admin principal. Data is read from the backend session.

sso_templates.title: SSO Error Templates
sso_templates.summary: Customize SSO error messages per error code. This is what users will see when an error occurs.
sso_templates.error_title: SSO error templates could not be loaded
sso_templates.empty_desc: SSO error catalog has not been loaded.
